title: Yazz's Redstone Golem
description: An Improved version of dungeon's redstone golem , It's back and meaner than ever  !!
body:
![The Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d0ddaf11e4a2f7335afef1754b345623601768a.png)




Yazz's RedStone Golem adds an improved version of the redstone golem from minecraft dungeons into your Minecraft world.

This mob has multiple diffrent attacks it can perform against you (or with you) compared to the original.

It can rarely spawn around pillager outposts. 

It can spawn in vanilla raids. level 3 Bad Omen and above.

    ● - Level 3: Stage 5 .
           
            Amount : 1 .
 
   ● - Level 4: Stage 3 and 5 .

            Amount 1 (per stage)

    ● - Level 5: Stage 3 4 and 5 .

            Amount : 1 (per stage)


And can also spawn during pillager patrols .

will be found around GrandOutposts.

Outcarriage's

Redstone mines. (w.ı.p)

The Forge. (w.ı.p)




NOTE:  This mod's name will be changed soon because it's no longer just a redstonegolem mod. . . I'll be adding other mobs from Minecraft Dungeon's Aswell. among with structure's items and my own game mechanics . .
 
Update to 1.21.10 will come . 

No plans for fabric at the moment . 





Current Plans:

Fix the structure generation to perfection . ( I know it can have silly generations sometimes )

Finish the new Illagers. (Raid Captains , Geomancer, and few more)

Give redstone golem a summon mine's attack alongside cube's (It can choose between the two randomly) (On hard mode. Maybe always spawn both in a single summon)

Finish Advanvements .

(If you have any Suggestions please drop them on comments and I'll look at them !)


**REQUIRES GECKOLIB 4-8-2 !!**

Feel free to include this mod in any modpacks !!
